ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone formally presenting a name card or other important document.  The movement should be precise and controlled, reflecting respect and formality. The animation starts with both arms at the sides. In the second frame, the right arm moves forward to chest height, palm up. The wrist will be slightly rotated to present the item gracefully. The third frame shows the arm extending slightly forward, palm still up, as if offering the item to another person. The fourth frame shows a slight retraction of the arm, as if the item has been accepted and the gesture is completed. The fifth frame shows the arm back at the side. The left arm remains mostly still, slightly bent at the elbow, to maintain balance and avoid distracting from the presented item. This gesture should convey a sense of politeness and formality, fitting with the reserved nature of the emoji.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, poised for presentation
right arm lifts forward, palm open and ready
offering the item with a gentle, formal extension
the gesture completes, arm begins to retract
both arms return to a resting, respectful state
